# Gold Project Management

> Fractional delivery leadership and PMO support for PE-backed and Series A-C companies.

Gold Project Management installs delivery infrastructure for fast-growing companies where delivery has become a bottleneck. We work with founders, COOs, and operating partners at PE-backed and venture-funded businesses to bring clarity, control, and portfolio visibility without slowing them down.

## What we do

- Fractional delivery leadership (Head of Delivery / Head of PMO)
- Delivery operating model design and implementation
- PMO setup and optimisation
- Post-acquisition integration delivery
- Portfolio visibility and governance for investors and boards
- Capacity planning and resource optimisation
- Delivery health checks and diagnostics

## How we work

We follow a three-phase model:

1. **Diagnostic (2 weeks, £5,000 fixed)**: We map your delivery landscape, identify bottlenecks, and create a clear picture of what's broken and what matters most.
2. **Build (3-6 months, £15,000-£25,000/month)**: We install the systems, rhythms, and visibility your leadership team needs. Embedded delivery leadership, not advisory.
3. **Safety Net (1-3 months, £5,000/month)**: Advisory support before exit, with a 90-day callback guarantee.

## Who we help

- PE-backed portfolio companies needing delivery visibility for investors
- Series A-C startups scaling beyond informal project management
- Post-acquisition businesses integrating delivery across merged teams
- Companies with failing transformations or re-orgs
- COOs and founders at companies with 50-500 employees

## Published pricing

- Diagnostic: £5,000 fixed (2 weeks)
- Build phase: £15,000-£25,000/month (3-6 months)
- Safety Net: £5,000/month (1-3 months)
- No hidden fees. No scope creep. Published on website.

## Team

- **Michael Gold** - Founder & Lead Strategic Consultant. 20+ years of delivery leadership across FTSE 100 programmes and PE-backed scale-ups. APM Chartered Project Professional, MSP Practitioner, Agile/SAFe Certified, Prince2 Practitioner.

## Client results

- Attercop: Forecasting accuracy improved by 40%, structured visibility across entire portfolio
- Tidewater: Average delivery cadence improved by 30%
- Clearpath: 25% reduction in project overhead
- Ironforge: 3x team velocity increase within 5 months

## Clients we have worked with

Sponge Learning, AVT Connect, Attercop, Kineo, Skillsoft, TikTok, Rolls Royce, IKEA, EY, International Airlines Group

## Location

UK-based, operating globally across UK, Europe, and North America time zones. Based in London. Remote by design.
